summary: Top Up BL Coins feature testing completed successfully. The TopUpCoinsModal appears correctly when users with insufficient balance (<200 BL coins) attempt listing creation. All 4 pricing tiers display correctly, and Stripe checkout integration works. Fixed a bug in CoinsPurchaseSuccess.jsx where null AuthContext caused a crash.

fixed_bugs.issue: Crash when accessing page without valid AuthContext - TypeError: Cannot destructure property 'user' of useContext(...) as it is null
fixed_bugs.fix: Changed from destructuring { user, setUser } to optional chaining authContext?.user

critical_code_review_comments: TopUpCoinsModal.jsx correctly implements all 4 pricing tiers: $4.99/30K, $9.99/80K, $14.99/400K, $29.99/1M BL coins
data-testid attributes correctly implemented: topup-coins-modal, tier-starter, tier-popular, tier-premium, tier-ultimate, purchase-coins-btn
Modal displays current balance, required amount, and deficit correctly
Stripe checkout integration via POST /api/payments/stripe/bl-coins/checkout works correctly
All 3 pages (CreateListing.jsx, AIListingCreator.jsx, MemberPageDashboard.jsx) have showTopUpModal state and logic
returnUrl and returnState properly stored in sessionStorage for post-purchase redirect
seed_data_creation: Created test user tester@blendlink.net with 50,000 BL coins balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top Up BL Coins feature is fully implemented and tested. Key test scenarios: (1) User with <200 BL coins triggers TopUpCoinsModal when creating listing, (2) All 4 pricing tiers work with Stripe checkout, (3) CoinsPurchaseSuccess page handles invalid sessions gracefully. Test user balance was temporarily set to 100 to test insufficient balance flow, then restored to 50,000.

topup_modal_trigger_createListing.notes: Modal appears when balance < 200 during form submission

stripe_bl_coins_checkout_endpoint.notes: Returns valid Stripe checkout URL for all tiers

stripe_bl_coins_status_endpoint.notes: Properly validates session_id format and handles invalid sessions

coins_purchase_success_page.notes: Fixed null AuthContext crash, now displays error state for invalid sessions

insufficient_balance_detection.notes: Backend returns 400 with 'Insufficient BL coins' message when balance < 200

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature implementation verified working correctly. One bug fix applied to CoinsPurchaseSuccess.jsx for handling null AuthContext.
